title: Cloud Storage
text: Cloud storage is useful for syncing files across devices. Services like Dropbox and Google Drive provide backup features.

title: AI Assistants
text: AI assistants like Siri use voice recognition and natural language processing to respond to user commands.

title: BM25 Algorithm
text: BM25 is a ranking function used in information retrieval. It improves on TF-IDF by normalizing term frequency and document length.

title: Python Programming
text: Python is used for machine learning, data science, and web development. It is popular in the AI community.

title: Information Retrieval
text: Information retrieval systems help users find relevant documents in large collections using queries and ranking algorithms.
